/usr/bin/gcc -fsanitize=address,undefined -fno-omit-frame-pointer -O3 -march=native -Wall -Wextra -Werror -fno-exceptions -g -fsanitize=address,undefined -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/test_parse_simple.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/test_parse_simple.dir/tests/test_parse_simple.c.o -o test_parse_simple  -lhubbub -lparserutils
